name: OpenIPAHound 03 Control - Service Key Control
description: Finds principals with modeled read-key or rotate-key control over FreeIPA service principals. Validate by retrieving or creating the keytab, initializing as that principal, proving the Kerberos identity, and cleaning up.
query:
MATCH p=(principal)-[control:IPA_ReadKerberosKey|IPA_ForceChangePassword]->(service:IPA_Service)
WHERE principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group OR principal:IPA_Service OR principal:IPA_Computer
RETURN p,
       coalesce(principal.uid, principal.cn, principal.principal, principal.fqdn) AS principal_name,
       service.principal AS service_principal,
       service.hostfqdn AS service_host,
       type(control) AS control_type,
       control.sourceattribute AS source_attribute
LIMIT 1000
